data.title: ATB Financial, a local bank in Alberta, Canada, will provide services to crypto companies
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Against the backdrop of most financial institutions refusing to provide services to crypto companies, ATB Financial, wholly owned by the Alberta government of Canada, has become one of the banking partners of the country's crypto and blockchain industries. This move echoes the Alberta government's strategy to obtain billions of dollars in revenue from blockchain companies. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Pyth Network: Pyth Core and Entropy are now available on Berachain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The decentralized oracle protocol Pyth Network announced on the X platform that Pyth Core and Entropy have been launched on Berachain. Pyth Network will provide real-time price data services for 11 assets including BERA, BTC, ETH, USDC, PYUSD, etc. to Berachain ecosystem developers.

data.title: SOL falls below 190 USDT
data.description: OKX market data shows that SOL fell below 190 USDT and is now at 189.92 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 4.79%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: An international hacker with over 50 crypto accounts was arrested in Spain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Spanish police arrested a hacker suspected of attacking multiple international organizations including the US Army. The suspect has more than 50 cryptocurrency accounts containing different types of crypto assets. The dangerous hacker is suspected of being behind up to 40 attacks on high-profile and highly sensitive organizations in the United States and Spain. (Forbes)

data.title: Trump’s company files for ‘Bitcoin Plus’ ETF
data.description:
Trump Media & Technology Group files for trademarks to launch Bitcoin Plus ETF, marking the first-ever launch by a U.S. president.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/policy/trumps-company-files-for-bitcoin-plus-etf

data.title: US AI import ban would reach farther than DeepSeek, but it’s a longshot
data.description:

data.title: Coinbase International will launch PENGU, POPCAT and HNT contract trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase International Station announced on the X platform that Coinbase International Exchange and Coinbase Advanced will launch PENGU, POPCAT and HNT contract transactions, and transactions will be opened on or after 9:30 am (UTC time) on February 13, 2025.

data.title: Spanish Police Arrest Hacker Linked To Multiple International Attacks
data.description: According to Foresight News, Spanish authorities have apprehended a hacker suspected of launching attacks on the U.S. Army and various other international organizations. The individual reportedly possesses over 50 cryptocurrency accounts containing a variety of digital assets. This dangerous hacker is believed to be responsible for up to 40 attacks targeting high-profile and highly sensitive organizations in both the United States and Spain.
